docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODKIND, ALEXANDER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LE, LAN AS AGENT FOR LANDLORD JOANNA KONG $1,335.04 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,460.04, SEE ATTACHED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY GOODKIND, ALEXANDER AS TO DEFENDANT LE, LAN AS AGENT FOR LANDLORD JOANNA KONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-13-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS $50.00 SERVED OCT-06-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LE, LAN AS AGENT FOR LANDLORD JOANNA KONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-13-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER GOODKIND IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAN LE IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
